name: Photography & Videography
description: Professional photography and videography services for commercial, editorial, and creative projects — from product and e‑commerce shoots to cinematic film productions and documentaries.

name: Weddings
description: Full-service wedding photography and videography capturing candid moments and cinematic highlights, including edited reels, drone coverage, and custom storytelling packages.

name: Advertising
description: Creative advertising and marketing media production that elevates brands through targeted campaigns, product showcases, and social media content tailored for conversion and engagement.

name: Music Production
description: Comprehensive music production and post‑production services, including music video creation, audio editing, mixing/mastering support, and promotional strategies for artists and labels.
